01 — 09
Portfolio 2026

Huen

Digital Art & Design — Year 2 Studio-2

April 23, 2026  ·  Assiniboine College

The Beginning

Why I Chose This Program

I came to this program to start something new. ／我来到这个专业是为了开始新的方向。

My first goal was simple: learn design from the ground up. ／最初的目标很简单：从零开始学设计。

But over two years, my goal changed. Now I want to use design to solve real problems — building apps and tools that help people in daily life. ／但两年下来，我的目标变了。现在我想用设计解决真实问题——做出能帮助人们日常生活的应用和工具。

01
Project 01

My First Design

A poster about Movable Type Printing — my very first design project, created in Photoshop. ／一张关于活字印刷术的海报——我的第一个设计作品，用 Photoshop 制作。

This project sparked my creative desire. It was the beginning of my journey into art and design. ／这个项目激发了我的创造欲望，是我踏入美术设计领域的起点。

02
Project 02

The Last Stronghold

My first 3D project — a detailed environment scene built and published on Sketchfab. ／我的第一个 3D 项目——一个精细的场景作品，发布在 Sketchfab 上。

This project expanded my design thinking from 2D to 3D, giving me a more complete aesthetic sense across multiple dimensions. ／这个项目让我从 2D 设计迈向了更多维的设计，在更多层面拥有了完整的审美能力。

03
Project 03

CatHead

My first full design-to-product journey — brand & packaging using Illustrator, Blender, and InDesign. ／我第一次完整走完从设计到实物的全流程——品牌与包装设计。

I learned that design must work in the real world. Paper, material, and build quality matter just as much as the visual. ／我学到设计必须考虑现实限制。纸张、材质、成品率和视觉同样重要。

04
Project 04

Atelier Invest

Independent study — a financial analysis app designed in Figma and built with VS Code vibe coding. ／独立研究项目——用 Figma 设计、VS Code vibe coding 开发的金融分析 App。

This project brought everything together — research, UI design, coding, and managing a project on my own. ／这个项目把我所学的一切融合在一起——调研、UI 设计、编程、独立管理项目。

Growth

Skills I've Developed

UI/UX Design

Figma, user flows, interface layout／界面设计与用户体验

Coding

VS Code, vibe coding, front-end dev／编程与前端开发

Workflow Design

Planning steps, managing tools and process／工作流程设计与管理

Problem Solving

Debugging, adapting, finding solutions／排查问题、灵活应对

Reflection

What I'm Most Proud Of

"I took one project through the entire journey — from finding a real problem, to user research, to UI/UX design, to development, to launch, to marketing. It now has 50+ users. It's not a big number, but I ran the full process from start to finish — by myself."

／我把一个项目从发现痛点、用户调研、方案设计、UI/UX 设计、开发上线到营销运营全链路跑通了一遍。目前有 50+ 用户。数字不大，但我一个人走完了全程。

Looking Ahead

What's Next for Me

I will keep working independently — building products that solve real problems. ／我会继续以独立开发的方式，做能解决真实问题的产品。

My dream is simple: one day, one of my products can support my life — so I can keep creating on my own terms. ／我的梦想很简单：有一天，我的某个产品能养活我，让我按自己的方式持续创造。

Thank You
